capture_the_front_of_the_vehicle_includi.summary: Front: medium scratch on bumper, both headlights intact, grille clean.

capture_the_rear_of_the_vehicle_includin.summary: Rear: small dent on boot lid, tail lights working.

capture_the_left_side_panels_doors_and_m.summary: Left side: panels clean, driver door has light swirl marks.

capture_the_right_side_panels_doors_and_.summary: Right side: rear door repainted (paint thickness anomaly detected).

inspect_and_photograph_each_tyre_tread_a.summary: Tyres: front-left tread is low (~1.5mm); others acceptable.

capture_the_dashboard_seats_and_odometer.summary: Interior: clean, odometer reads 58,420 km, no warning lights.

open_the_bonnet_and_capture_the_engine_b.summary: Engine bay: glare on coolant reservoir, fluid level unclear (recapture advised).
